name: Physics Puzzle Game
description: A physics-based puzzle game (like Angry Birds style) with projectile launching, destructible structures, rigid body physics, and scoring based on destruction. Targets Rapier or Matter.js.

requiredElements.name: physics-world
requiredElements.description: Rigid body physics world with gravity, collision, and restitution.

requiredElements.name: projectile-launcher
requiredElements.description: Drag-to-aim launcher with trajectory preview and release-to-fire.

requiredElements.name: destructible-blocks
requiredElements.description: Stacked blocks that topple, collide, and break under impact.

requiredElements.name: target-objectives
requiredElements.description: Targets/enemies to hit with the projectile for scoring.

requiredElements.name: score-system
requiredElements.description: Score based on targets hit, blocks destroyed, and projectiles remaining.

optionalElements.name: trajectory-preview
optionalElements.description: Dotted line showing predicted projectile path before launch.

optionalElements.name: block-types
optionalElements.description: Different block materials (wood/stone/glass) with varying durability.

optionalElements.name: star-rating
optionalElements.description: 1-3 star rating based on score thresholds per level.

qualityRules.description: Drag has elastic resistance feel; release has satisfying launch snap.
Screen shake on impact, slow-mo on near-miss, particle debris on break.
Clear visual feedback on target hit (flash, score popup, sound).
Physics simulation is stable — no jittering, tunneling, or explosion.
Levels are solvable with multiple approaches; difficulty curves up.
Physics steps at fixed timestep; rendering interpolates.
Blocks have distinct textures/materials; clear visual hierarchy.
Broken block meshes are disposed and removed from scene.

antiPatterns.description: Stacked blocks jitter or slide slowly — breaks immersion.
Launching feels limp — no snap, no sound, no trail.
Level is impossible to 3-star due to poor block placement.
Broken blocks remain in physics world and scene graph — memory leak.

improvementSuggestions.description: Add dotted trajectory preview line that updates as player drags.
Slow time to 0.3x for 500ms on near-miss for dramatic effect.
Add particle debris when blocks shatter.

exampleOutputs.label: Rapier physics world init
